title: Mentor Guide — Day 4: Entrepreneur
coachingObjective: Explore venture paths and canvas ownership.

timing.preSession: 10 min — review deck speaker notes and observation form
timing.duringSession: Circulate during squad activities; coach individuals at transitions
timing.postSession: 15 min — complete observation forms and coaching notes

discussionQuestions: What type of business excites you?
Would you rather build a Practice, Team, or Agency? Why?
What would you build first on your canvas?
coachingTips: Use canvas gaps as prompts not grades
reflectionPrompts: Which track feels most like you today?

activityCoachingNotes.note: Stand behind participant during strategy statement — ask who they serve.
